title: Rebuild admin authorization system with persistent role storage

requirements.text: Implement persistent storage for admin users in the backend main actor, ensuring admin user data including principal and role are saved in stable variables that survive canister upgrades

quotes: Ensure admin user is stored in persistent storage
Ensure admin role is saved and retrievable after deploy

acceptanceCriteria: Admin user data is stored in stable variables
Admin role persists across canister deployments and upgrades
Admin principal and role mapping is retrievable after deploy

requirements.text: Modify deleteMediaAsset function to check admin role from stored user data instead of using hardcoded principal comparison

quotes: Ensure deleteMediaAsset checks role from stored user data
Do NOT use hardcoded principal comparison
Verify admin role before allowing delete

acceptanceCriteria: deleteMediaAsset queries stored admin user data to verify role
No hardcoded principal comparisons exist in deleteMediaAsset
Authorization check validates that caller's principal has admin role in storage
Returns appropriate error if caller is not found in admin users or lacks admin role

requirements.text: Ensure the currently logged-in admin user has role 'admin' assigned in persistent storage and this role is verified before allowing delete operations

quotes: Ensure current logged-in admin user has role: 'admin'
Verify admin role before allowing delete

acceptanceCriteria: Admin user record includes role field set to 'admin'
deleteMediaAsset verifies caller's role equals 'admin' before proceeding
Role check happens at runtime using stored data, not compile-time constants

requirements.text: Preserve existing functionality for media listing and upload operations, ensuring they remain unaffected by authorization system changes

quotes: Do not affect media listing or upload

acceptanceCriteria: getMediaAssets function continues to work with authenticated users
createMediaAsset function continues to work with authenticated users
Only deleteMediaAsset authorization logic is modified
Media listing and upload flows remain unchanged

constraints: Do not use hardcoded principal comparison for authorization
Do not modify media listing or upload functionality
Admin role must be stored in persistent backend storage
Authorization must check stored user data, not hardcoded values
nonGoals: Adding new admin user management features
